message:
chore(beads): Sync issue tracker state after feature implementation

Update Beads issue tracker to reflect completed work from this session,
closing implemented features and updating issue statuses.

## Issues Updated

This sync reflects:
- Install.sh Tier 1+2 feature completion (issues #13-17, #19-22)
- Resource lifecycle correlation for all 7 languages
- AST-based leak detection across all modules
- Test suite enhancements (substring validation, manifest updates)

Issue statuses have been updated to reflect current state of the codebase
after the comprehensive enhancement session.

## Beads Files Modified

- .beads/beads.base.jsonl: Issue status updates

The JSONL format preserves full issue history and dependencies for future
reference and tracking.
